candidate.objective: A highly experienced Senior Site Supervisor and Project Manager with over 25 years in the civil construction and mining industries, encompassing power and solar infrastructure, concrete works, civil earthworks, water capture and transfer, load and haul, and pad construction. Scott holds a Schedule 26 statutory mine supervisor certificate and has delivered complex multi-workgroup projects for Tier 1 clients including Rio Tinto and Fortescue, with demonstrated expertise in budget management, safety leadership, and site-based project management.

duties: Managed several large-scale projects including the construction of land farms, major and minor roadworks, civil construction, and multiple concurrent workgroup management.
Administered and reported against budgeting KPIs, production KPIs, and safety KPIs across all supervised projects.
Oversaw all aspects of site-based project supervision and management, ensuring client scope of works was delivered on time and within budget.
Coordinated personnel, plant, and materials resources across multiple workgroups to optimise productivity and safety outcomes.
Managed road and access track construction and maintenance.
Coordinated pipeline and data line construction works.
Conducted site-based project management including budget controls, coordination of all resources, and OHS&E management, ensuring team members adhered to client scope of works at all times.
Supervised foundation works for transmission and distribution line infrastructure.
Managed Rio Tinto solar farm and bore pad construction projects.
Delivered staff training and performance management.
Conducted site-based project management including budget controls, coordination of all resources, and OHS&E management, ensuring team members adhered to client scope of works at all times.

skills.detail: Over 25 years of site supervision and project management experience across civil mining, power infrastructure, and earthworks. Proven in budget management, KPI reporting, and multi-workgroup coordination.
Extensive experience in land farm construction, bore pad development, roadworks, pipeline construction, civil earthworks, and clearing operations across iron ore and solar energy projects.
Holds a Schedule 26 statutory mine supervisor certificate. Completed Safety Leadership for Supervisors training. Experienced in OHS&E management, SWMS development, and incident management.
Supervised foundation works and construction activities for transmission, distribution, and solar energy projects for Rio Tinto and other Tier 1 clients.
Competent operator of excavators, skid steers, and telehandlers. Holds an HR-B Drivers Licence and is proficient in 4WD vehicle operation in remote environments.

certifications.details: Western Australian statutory mine supervisor certificate under the Mines Safety and Inspection Act.
Western Australian statutory senior mine supervisor certificate.
Formal safety leadership training for site supervisors in the mining and construction industries.

certifications.ticket: Work Safely in the Construction Industry (White Card)
certifications.details: Construction industry general induction — White Card.
Certified for the operation of four-wheel drive vehicles in remote and off-road environments.
Competent operator of excavators for civil and mining earthworks.
Competent operator of skid steer loaders.
Competent operator of telehandlers for materials handling and elevated placement.
Western Australian Heavy Rigid with Bus (HR-B) class motor vehicle drivers licence.
Approved site induction for Rio Tinto operations.
Approved site induction for Fortescue operations.

referees: Professional references available upon request. Please contact ACM Resources to facilitate introduction.
